response:
To compute the **sample standard deviation** of the data set:

$$
\{25, 10, 0, 9, -1, -14, -21\}
$$

---

### **Step 1: Find the mean (average) of the data set**

$$
\text{Mean} = \frac{25 + 10 + 0 + 9 + (-1) + (-14) + (-21)}{7}
$$

$$
= \frac{25 + 10 + 0 + 9 - 1 - 14 - 21}{7}
= \frac{10}{7}
$$

---

### **Step 2: Compute the squared differences from the mean**

We calculate $(x_i - \bar{x})^2$ for each data point.

$$
\begin{align*}
(25 - \frac{10}{7})^2 &= \left(\frac{175 - 10}{7}\right)^2 = \left(\frac{165}{7}\right)^2 = \frac{27225}{49} \\
(10 - \frac{10}{7})^2 &= \left(\frac{60}{7}\right)^2 = \frac{3600}{49} \\
(0 - \frac{10}{7})^2 &= \left(-\frac{10}{7}\right)^2 = \frac{100}{49} \\
(9 - \frac{10}{7})^2 &= \left(\frac{53}{7}\right)^2 = \frac{2809}{49} \\
(-1 - \frac{10}{7})^2 &= \left(-\frac{17}{7}\right)^2 = \frac{289}{49} \\
(-14 - \frac{10}{7})^2 &= \left(-\frac{108}{7}\right)^2 = \frac{11664}{49} \\
(-21 - \frac{10}{7})^2 &= \left(-\frac{157}{7}\right)^2 = \frac{24649}{49} \\
\end{align*}
$$
